title: Can Convert String in K Moves
hints: Start by matching characters that already equal their target; these require zero shifts and cost nothing.
For each mismatch, calculate the minimal positive shift needed. Notice that shifts repeat every 26 steps, so you must handle collisions when multiple characters need the same base shift.
Group mismatches by their required base shift. For each group, check if the cumulative cost of resolving all collisions within that group fits within k.
